languages.text: "Я стану на путь искупления. Уроки, извлеченные мной из попыток сотворить Триасомату, позволят мне направить свои навыки в угодное Омниссии русло. Я дарую долголетие достойным, дав им возможность отринуть смерть ради служения Империуму. Уподобившись Движущей Силе, я буду питать ключевые элементы машины Империума, чтобы их функция выполнялась до последнего".

"I will set foot on the path of redemption. The lessons I have learned from my attempts to create the Triasomata will allow me to direct my skills in a course pleasing to the Omnissiah. I will grant longevity to the worthy, enabling them to defy death in service to the Imperium. In the likeness of the Motive Force, I will nourish the key elements of the Imperium's machinery so that their functions will be carried out to the last."
languages.original_text: "Я стану на путь искупления. Уроки, извлеченные мной из попыток сотворить Триасомату, позволят мне направить свои навыки в угодное Омниссии русло. Я дарую долголетие достойным, дав им возможность отринуть смерть ради служения Империуму. "I will set foot on the path of redemption. The lessons I have learned from my attempts to create the Triasomata will allow me to direct my skills in a course pleasing to the Omnissiah. I will grant longevity to the worthy, enabling them to defy death in service to the Imperium. In the likeness of the Motive Force, I will nourish the key elements of the Imperium's machinery so that their functions will be carried out to the last."

languages.text: «Emprenderé el camino de la redención. Las lecciones que he aprendido en mis intentos de crear el triasómata me ayudarán a dar a mis habilidades un uso que agrade al Omnissiah. Daré longevidad a quienes la merecen, ayudándoles a desafiar a la muerte al servicio del Imperium. Al igual que la Fuerza Motriz, nutriré los elementos clave de la maquinaria del Imperium para que cumpla su función hasta el fin».
languages.original_text: "I will set foot on the path of redemption. The lessons I have learned from my attempts to create the Triasomata will allow me to direct my skills in a course pleasing to the Omnissiah. I will grant longevity to the worthy, enabling them to defy death in service to the Imperium. In the likeness of the Motive Force, I will nourish the key elements of the Imperium's machinery so that their functions will be carried out to the last."

Daré longevidad a quienes la merecen, ayudándoles a desafiar a la muerte al servicio del Imperium. Al igual que la Fuerza Motriz, nutriré los elementos clave de la maquinaria del Imperium para que cumpla su función hasta el fin».

languages.text: 「私は贖罪の道に足を踏み入れます。トリアソマタを創り出そうとした試みから学んだ教訓は、私の技を、オムニッシアの御心にかなう方向へ振り向けることを可能にしてくれるでしょう。私は、ふさわしき者たちに長寿を授け、帝国への奉仕のうちに死に抗うことを可能にします。モーティヴ・フォースにならい、私は帝国という機構の要となる構成要素を養い、その機能が最後まで全うされるようにするのです」
languages.original_text: "I will set foot on the path of redemption. The lessons I have learned from my attempts to create the Triasomata will allow me to direct my skills in a course pleasing to the Omnissiah. I will grant longevity to the worthy, enabling them to defy death in service to the Imperium. In the likeness of the Motive Force, I will nourish the key elements of the Imperium's machinery so that their functions will be carried out to the last."

traits.locale_text: 「私は贖罪の道に足を踏み入れます。トリアソマタを創り出そうとした試みから学んだ教訓は、私の技を、オムニッシアの御心にかなう方向へ振り向けることを可能にしてくれるでしょう。私は、ふさわしき者たちに長寿を授け、帝国への奉仕のうちに死に抗うことを可能にします。モーティヴ・フォースにならい、私は帝国という機構の要となる構成要素を養い、その機能が最後まで全うされるようにするのです」

languages.text: “我将踏上赎罪之路。我从创造三相体的尝试中吸取了教训，这将指引我将自己的技艺用于欧姆尼赛亚所认可的方向。我将赠予那些配得之人以长寿，令其为帝国效力，挣脱死亡的束缚。我将效仿源力，滋养帝国机械的关键部件，使其运行至最后一刻。”
languages.original_text: "I will set foot on the path of redemption. The lessons I have learned from my attempts to create the Triasomata will allow me to direct my skills in a course pleasing to the Omnissiah. I will grant longevity to the worthy, enabling them to defy death in service to the Imperium. In the likeness of the Motive Force, I will nourish the key elements of the Imperium's machinery so that their functions will be carried out to the last."

traits.locale_text: “我将踏上赎罪之路。我从创造三相体的尝试中吸取了教训，这将指引我将自己的技艺用于欧姆尼赛亚所认可的方向。我将赠予那些配得之人以长寿，令其为帝国效力，挣脱死亡的束缚。我将效仿源力，滋养帝国机械的关键部件，使其运行至最后一刻。”

languages.text: "Ich werde den Pfad der Erlösung einschlagen. Die Lektionen, die ich bei meinen Versuchen, den Triasomata zu erschaffen, gelernt habe, werden mir erlauben, meine Fähigkeiten in den Dienst des Omnissiah zu stellen. Ich werde den Würdigen Langlebigkeit gewähren, damit sie dem Tod im Dienst des Imperiums trotzen können. Im Antlitz der Antriebskraft werde ich die Schlüsselelemente der Maschinerie des Imperiums nähren, auf dass sie ihre Funktion bis zuletzt erfüllen.
languages.original_text: "I will set foot on the path of redemption. The lessons I have learned from my attempts to create the Triasomata will allow me to direct my skills in a course pleasing to the Omnissiah. I will grant longevity to the worthy, enabling them to defy death in service to the Imperium. In the likeness of the Motive Force, I will nourish the key elements of the Imperium's machinery so that their functions will be carried out to the last."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde den Pfad der Erlösung einschlagen. Die Lektionen, die ich bei meinen Versuchen, den Triasomata zu erschaffen, gelernt habe, werden mir erlauben, meine Fähigkeiten in den Dienst des Omnissiah zu stellen. Ich werde den Würdigen Langlebigkeit gewähren, damit sie dem Tod im Dienst des Imperiums trotzen können. Im Antlitz der Antriebskraft werde ich die Schlüsselelemente der Maschinerie des Imperiums nähren, auf dass sie ihre Funktion bis zuletzt erfüllen.

languages.text: « Je vais partir sur la voie de la rédemption. Les leçons que j'ai apprises lors de mes tentatives de création de Triasomata me permettront de mettre mes compétences au service de l'Omnimessie. J'accorderai la longévité aux personnes qui en sont dignes et leur permettrai de vaincre la mort pour servir l'Imperium. Tout comme la Force Motrice, j'alimenterai les pièces maîtresses de la machine de l'Imperium afin qu'elles puissent assurer leurs fonctions jusqu'au bout. »
languages.original_text: "I will set foot on the path of redemption. The lessons I have learned from my attempts to create the Triasomata will allow me to direct my skills in a course pleasing to the Omnissiah. I will grant longevity to the worthy, enabling them to defy death in service to the Imperium. In the likeness of the Motive Force, I will nourish the key elements of the Imperium's machinery so that their functions will be carried out to the last."

traits.locale_text: « Je vais partir sur la voie de la rédemption. languages.text: "Kefaret yoluna adım atacağım. Üçyeköz'ü yaratma girişimlerimden öğrendiğim dersler, becerilerimi Hermesih'i memnun edecek bir rotaya yönlendirmemi sağlayacak. Layık olanlara uzun ömür bahşedecek, İmparatorluk hizmetinde ölüme meydan okumalarını sağlayacağım. Devinim Gücü'ne benzer şekilde, işlevlerini sonuna kadar yerine getirebilmeleri için İmparatorluk mekanizmasının kilit unsurlarını besleyeceğim."
languages.original_text: "I will set foot on the path of redemption. The lessons I have learned from my attempts to create the Triasomata will allow me to direct my skills in a course pleasing to the Omnissiah. I will grant longevity to the worthy, enabling them to defy death in service to the Imperium. In the likeness of the Motive Force, I will nourish the key elements of the Imperium's machinery so that their functions will be carried out to the last."
